name: Hina Ebina
description: Hina is a classmate of [Yui](https://anilist.co/character/67069) and [Hachiman](https://anilist.co/character/67065), who is a quiet girl and hangs around [Yumiko](https://anilist.co/character/79593/). She is a fujoshi, which is why other boys from her class are always avoiding her.
